changeSet.author: openelis-tb
changeSet.comment: Rename TB Page 1 from 'Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture' to 'Sample Accession & Registration' in notebook_page table

column.name: instructions
column.value: Import TB samples from delivery manifest with complete metadata. Verify sample information and mark as verified to proceed.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Accession & Registration - Complete metadata entry and verification for TB samples

update.where: notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory') AND page_order = 1 AND title = 'Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture'

changeSet.author: openelis-tb
changeSet.comment: Rename TB Page 1 template from 'Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture' to 'Sample Accession & Registration' in workflow_page_template table

column.name: description
column.value: Import and register TB samples from delivery manifest with complete metadata

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Import TB samples from delivery manifest with complete metadata. Verify sample information and mark as verified to proceed.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Accession & Registration - Complete metadata entry and verification for TB samples

update.where: workflow_category = 'TB' AND display_order = 1 AND name = 'Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture'

changeSet.author: openelis-tb
changeSet.comment: Rename TB Page 1 in existing notebook entries (notebook_entry_page if it exists)

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Accession & Registration - Complete metadata entry and verification for TB samples

update.where: notebook_entry_id IN ( SELECT ne.id FROM clinlims.notebook_entry ne JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON ne.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' ) AND page_order = 1 AND title = 'Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture'
